name: solosis
flavor_texts: They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others.
Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they can survive in any environment.
Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they are fine in any environment, no matter how severe.
It communicates with others telepathically. Its body is encapsulated in liquid, but if it takes a heavy blow, the liquid will leak out.
Many say that the special liquid covering this Pokémon’s body would allow it to survive in the vacuum of space.
text: Solosis is the Cell Pokémon. It is a psychic-type Pokémon. Abilities: overcoat, magic-guard, regenerator (hidden). Base stats — HP: 45, Attack: 30, Defense: 40, Sp. Atk: 105, Sp. Def: 50, Speed: 20. Evolution line: solosis → duosion → reuniclus. Lore: They drive away attackers by unleashing psychic power. They can use telepathy to talk with others. Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they can survive in any environment. Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they are fine in any environment, no matter how severe. It communicates with others telepathically. Its body is encapsulated in liquid, but if it takes a heavy blow, the liquid will leak out. Many say that the special liquid covering this Pokémon’s body would allow it to survive in the vacuum of space.
